github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text: Commit message must follow the format: 'LED-XXXXX type(scope): subject'. Extract the ticket number from the current branch name (pattern: LED-XXXXX-description). Allowed types: feat, fix, docs, style, refactor, perf, test, build, ci, chore, revert. Scope is optional (e.g. fullscreen, mobile, platform-core). Subject must be in imperative mood, lowercase, no period at the end.
